# Exterminate

## Observed Text

- Deal 3 damage 4 times to ALL enemies.
- Added by the Bugslayer event.

---
<!-- META-AGENT NOTES — do not edit above this line -->
## Strategy Notes

- AoE multi-hit attack; strong against multi-enemy fights, Hard to Kill style caps, and Ornamental Fan/Juggling attack-count turns.
- Against Thieving Hopper, Exterminate removes four Flutter stacks; one additional Attack hit stuns the Hat Trick turn.
